title: Assistant Store Manager - Costco India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Costco India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Costco India Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Costco India Ventures Solutions:
Costco India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India Ventures Solutions!
